author: Campbell Barton
name: Scylla tokenizer + n-gram + tuned legal TTT
blurb: Scylla ~998-token TokenMonster vocab with n-gram (order 2-16) eval and score-first legal TTT (LR=0.005, 3 epochs). 11-layer 512-dim transformer with cyclic shared blocks, BigramHash embeddings, int6-per-row + lzma quantization (clip_range=20). Three seeds validated on 8xH100, all artifacts under 15.4MB.
